creator: nox@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I don't find references to libxcb-atom.la in libxine's work/ dir here - 
libxcb-atom.la seems to belong to an old version of x11/xcb-util so my 
guess is you have half-updated ports and/or /usr/ports/UPDATING wasn't 
followed.  (At least entry 20120116 looks relevant.)
